description: Weekly scorecard for BBI v8.5 baseline vs 4 shadow variants. Appended by Mnemosyne each week. Promotion rule: any variant beating baseline by ≥0.03 Spearman AND ≥5% Brier for ≥3 consecutive weeks across ≥8 events gets flagged for manual promotion.

reference_benchmarks.notes: These are the numbers our BBI must match or beat to be a real predictor. Current BBI is computed on top of these DG inputs, so we expect similar or better Brier and hopefully better Spearman from course-weighted factor blending.

history.skip_reason: team_event — no individual baseline for shadow variant scoring
